fiction.title: A PARADE OF HORRIBLES
fiction.author: Matt Dinniman
fiction.description: The eighth book in the “Dungeon Crawler Carl” series. A sense of normalcy might be a set-up that spells danger for Carl and Donut.

fiction.title: YESTERYEAR
fiction.author: Caro Claire Burke
fiction.description: Natalie Heller Mills, a privileged tradwife social media influencer, wakes up to find she is living in the comparatively difficult reality of 1855.

fiction.title: BROKEN DOVE
fiction.author: Dani Francis
fiction.description: The second book in the “Silver Elite” series. As the war between the Mods and Primes escalates, issues of trust come to the fore.

fiction.title: THE FOURTH OPTION
fiction.author: Jack Carr and M.P. Woodward
fiction.description: The former Navy SEAL and C.I.A. ground branch operative Chris Walker doles out vigilante justice.

fiction.title: OUR PERFECT STORM
fiction.author: Carley Fortune
fiction.description: After her fiancé leaves her, Frankie goes on her planned honeymoon trip with her best friend from childhood, George.

nonfiction.title: SUICIDAL EMPATHY
nonfiction.author: Gad Saad
nonfiction.description: The host of the podcast “The Saad Truth” argues that what he considers misguided compassion is having a negative impact on society.

nonfiction.title: STRANGERS
nonfiction.author: Belle Burden
nonfiction.description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward.

nonfiction.title: TAKE ME TO YOUR LEADER
nonfiction.author: Neil deGrasse Tyson
nonfiction.description: The astrophysicist depicts what potential encounters with aliens from outer space might be like.

nonfiction.title: THE CASE FOR AMERICA
nonfiction.author: Bret Baier
nonfiction.description: The chief political anchor for Fox News shares his perspectives on our national character during divisive times.

nonfiction.title: DOGS, BOYS, AND OTHER THINGS I'VE CRIED ABOUT
nonfiction.author: Isabel Klee
nonfiction.description: Klee helps foster dogs overcome challenges while she faces her own complications.
